subject: Re: From Msg Sheet
body:
christies  

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> >let me know which way you would like to go w/this
> No treasure yet..are going to look at no.1 site
> tonight at 10.30pm my time..will keep you
> posted..this would be good , then I can come home :)
> Thinking of you and hoping you are going to
> hear/have heard good news
> Kisses
> >Christie's has become re-interested in JE's Shahzia
> Sikander painting (from the massage room hallway). 
> They are now giving us an estimate of $10,000-15,000
> and would be willing to sell it in one of two sales
> - one of which is their Contemporary Asian Art Sale,
> taking place in Hong Kong, on May 28th.  This piece
> is currently at a gallery that handles the majority
> of Sikander's art and which can likely sell it for
> $15,000 (netting us $12,000-13,000),  Please advise
> if you'd like the gallery to continue looking for
> prospective buyers and/or you'd like to give it back
> to Christie's.
> >
> >** End of Message
> 
>

body_html:
christies

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

let me know which way you would like to go w/this
No treasure yet..are going to look at no.1 site
tonight at 10.30pm my time..will keep you
posted..this would be good , then I can come home :)
Thinking of you and hoping you are going to
hear/have heard good news
Kisses
Christie's has become re-interested in JE's Shahzia
Sikander painting (from the massage room hallway).
They are now giving us an estimate of $10,000-15,000
and would be willing to sell it in one of two sales

  • one of which is their Contemporary Asian Art Sale,
    taking place in Hong Kong, on May 28th. This piece
    is currently at a gallery that handles the majority
    of Sikander's art and which can likely sell it for
    $15,000 (netting us $12,000-13,000), Please advise
    if you'd like the gallery to continue looking for
    prospective buyers and/or you'd like to give it back
    to Christie's.

** End of Message
